seoTitle: Luc Rousseau | Tech Lead / Lead developer resume
seoDescription: Luc Rousseau's resume as a Tech Lead and lead developer: architecture, mentoring, hiring, code reviews and delivery, without leaving the keyboard. 26 years of engineering. Quebec and remote.
tagline: A technical leader who still codes: architecture, quality, mentoring and delivery. I align a team around a solid technical foundation.

summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Tech Lead and lead developer with 26 years of web engineering, I lead through the technology: I architect reusable foundations, set the quality bar and mentor developers, without ever stopping shipping myself.

At nesto I laid down a centralized architecture serving as a shared foundation for every project, designed technical-skills assessments, and ran hiring and code reviews. Code and examples in the public repo lucrousseau/Luc-Rousseau-Consulting; this site (Next.js/React) as a live proof point.

items.title: Architecture and foundations
items.content: Centralized, reusable technical foundations; build-vs-buy calls and technical-debt trade-offs.

items.title: Quality and delivery
items.content: Code reviews, standards, CI/CD and performance; a quality bar that holds under pressure.

items.title: Team leadership
items.content: Mentoring, hiring, design of skills assessments, growing the developers around me.

items.title: Still technical
items.content: I still code (React, PHP/Laravel, APIs). I do not lead from an ivory tower.

items.summary: Technical leadership for growing teams: architecture, quality and mentoring.
bullets: Architecture of decoupled, reusable applications; structuring technical decisions.
Set up standards, code reviews and CI/CD pipelines.
Always hands-on: React, Next.js, PHP/Laravel, REST APIs.
Documented public repo (GitHub): quality bar (lint, typecheck, tests, hooks), layered architecture.
items.stack: React, Next.js, Laravel, PHP, TypeScript, REST APIs, CI/CD, Git

items.progression: Internal progression: senior developer → technical lead → Product Manager → Product Lead
items.summary: Multi-brand network; technical and product leadership.
bullets: Request-management program on a headless CMS, multi-subdomain (Canada and France).
Architecture and implementation of processes on a headless CMS; real-time React dashboards.
Aligned content, management and development; smoothed collaboration processes.
Steered technical and product initiatives, aligned with the organization's goals.
Team: 3 developers, 1 DevOps consultant, staff on parallel projects.
items.stack: Headless WordPress, React, PHP, REST APIs, CI/CD
